themes.themeDescription: Users are expressing frustration over delays in KYC validation during account opening, stating that documents have been pending for several days without status updates.
representativeQuotes: My KYC verification has been pending for the last 4 days and customer support is not responding.
Unable to start investing because my documents are still showing as in-progress since last week.
actionIdeas: Optimize automated KYC document classification queues to flag pending submissions earlier.
Implement a real-time status tracker in the app to show exactly which KYC step is currently being verified.

themes.themeDescription: Active options traders complain about latency issues where candlestick charts freeze or fail to update pricing instantly during high market volatility hours.
representativeQuotes: Options charts are loading very slowly today. Missed my trade exit price.
The candlestick chart completely froze at 9:30 AM right when the market opened. Please fix the lag.
actionIdeas: Investigate WebSockets connection pooling issues on the chart rendering interface.
Add a visual warning indicator for users when network ping goes above 150ms during live trading.
